props.title: Reference for Dungeon Masters
props.description: Dungeon Master tools, house references, encounter helpers, and shared table systems for running Myrdae games.

props.items: [{"id":"dm-reference-overview-grid","type":"grid","props":{"columns":"4","rows":"8","gap":"md","items":"[{\"id\":\"dm-reference-overview-art\",\"type\":\"image\",\"props\":{\"src\":\"/images/guides-to-myrdae/dm-reference.jpg\",\"alt\":\"Reference for Dungeon Masters cover artwork\",\"fit\":\"cover\",\"col\":\"1\",\"row\":\"1\",\"colSpan\":\"1\",\"rowSpan\":\"8\",\"objectPosition\":\"center 28%\"}},{\"id\":\"dm-reference-overview-heading\",\"type\":\"header\",\"props\":{\"eyebrow\":\"DM Toolkit\",\"title\":\"Reference for Dungeon Masters\",\"color\":\"gold\",\"size\":\"lg\",\"col\":\"2\",\"row\":\"1\",\"colSpan\":\"2\",\"rowSpan\":\"1\"}},{\"id\":\"dm-reference-overview-text\",\"type\":\"text\",\"props\":{\"content\":\"A table-facing index for rulings, laws, location types, services, waypoints, prices, and quick NPC support.\",\"col\":\"2\",\"row\":\"2\",\"colSpan\":\"3\",\"rowSpan\":\"1\"}},{\"id\":\"dm-reference-overview-link\",\"type\":\"link\",\"props\":{\"label\":\"Open Full Guide\",\"href\":\"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1eODEiSco7IhOJw_kJW92YqTJDdYO9IfG_tnnXfYUY80/edit?usp=sharing\",\"variant\":\"secondary\",\"col\":\"2\",\"row\":\"8\",\"colSpan\":\"1\",\"rowSpan\":\"1\"}}]"}}]
